content.en:
A few months later.

The supremes of the various races, represented by the gods and demons, contacted the Yuangu Hall and asked for a negotiation, and the content of the negotiation was about the method of transcendence in the dual universes.

No matter how much the supremes of the twelve universe epochs argue, it is useless, because the supremes of all races believe that the method of dual universe detachment is true, and they think that the supremes of the twelve universe epochs are carrying out this plan.

Unless the two sides completely break up and fall out, the Lord of the Yuan Gu and other supremes do not want to see such a scene.

After all, they couldn't kill all the Supremes, otherwise if the Universe Origin grows, their plan will fail, and if they let it go, let the Ten Thousand Races Supreme help the Universe Origin get out of suppression, the plan will still fail.

Therefore, the Lord of the Yuan Gu and other supreme beings must agree to negotiate.

---------

In an area outside the Yuangu Palace, a small world appeared here, which was a temporary world that was opened up for negotiation between the two sides.

This time.

The First God Lord, the First Demon Lord and other supreme beings came, but not in real bodies, but in incarnations.

Last time, they were really scared, and even if they had the confidence this time, they didn't dare to come in person.

After all, the Supreme Lords of the Yuan Gu and other Supremes didn't dare to kill too many Supremes, but killing one or two was not a problem.

So, they don't dare to take too many risks.

In a small world.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu waited for the Supreme to come, and met with the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord.

"First Divine Master, you are not so brave that you dare to come!"

The main road of the Yuangu.

"Lord of the Yuangu, why don't I dare to come? Your strength is indeed far superior to ours, but now that we have known your plan, you don't dare to kill too many Supremes, otherwise if your plan fails, even if you occupy the entire universe, what is the use, as soon as the universe is destroyed, you will also die, and it will be a real death, and you will not be able to live another cosmic era!"

The First Divine Lord said with a smile.

"Hmph, I don't know who sent the news, but just because you know about this plan, you can threaten me?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said angrily.

"Hahaha, Lord of the Ancient Ages, we can really threaten you, the Origin of the Universe has been suppressed by your Supreme Treasure, we already know it, no wonder it has been so difficult to communicate with the Origin of the Universe recently, and the Origin of the Universe has become so weak, some Tianjiao in the clan have impacted the Son of the Universe realm, and I haven't seen much of the power of the Origin of the Universe approaching. But after all, this is our universe, and we are the creatures of this cosmic era. If all races use their luck to merge into the origin of the universe and sacrifice their power to assist the origin of the universe, they will definitely be able to break the blockade, right?" the First Divine Lord threatened.

"You ......"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu and the others wanted to torture and kill the First Divine Master, but they didn't dare to do so.

Even if he really killed the First Divine Lord, as well as the First Demon Lord, the Second Divine Lord, etc., if he really forced this group of Supremes and caused their plan to fail, that would be the real regret.

Moreover, he can only be used as a representative, but he can't really control all the supremes, such as the Golden Light Supreme, the Stone Dragon Supreme and some other more powerful supremes, who usually listen to him, but they won't let him mess around at critical times.

"Say, what conditions do you have? Actually, this plan is good for you, and you have hope of transcendence, don't you? If you stop us, you can't transcend either. "The Lord of the Ancient Ageures.

"Very good!" the First Divine Lord smiled, "Lord of the Yuangu, we can also not destroy your plan, after all, even if the Dual Universe Project is opened and eventually leads to the collapse of the universe, it doesn't matter, anyway, the future of the universe has nothing to do with us, we also want to impact the transcendent realm." But you are too powerful for us to have any advantage over you. So, we need to sign a new agreement. "

"What an agreement, say!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said impatiently.

"In the future, you need to make sure that you don't attack us cosmic clans, as for the cosmic clans, that's whatever. There are also a lot of territories in the universe clans, which is enough for you to toss. In addition, the Supremes are not allowed to attack and kill our junior geniuses. The most important point is when another universe collides, we need to be told. How?"

The first god is the main way.

The Lord of the Protogens was silent, he was thinking.

Strictly speaking, the conditions proposed by the First Divine Lord are not excessive, but it will affect their luck.

They are still waiting for 100,000 years to pass, and then they will attack all races, occupy a large area of the universe, and gather infinite luck.

But now, in this way, they can not gather much luck.

After the Lord of the Yuan Gu and the other supreme deliberated, they finally agreed.

"Yes, we agreed!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said helplessly.

Soon, the two sides made a contractual agreement and roughly agreed.

......

After the First Divine Lord waited for the Supreme to leave, the Lord of the Yuan Gu and the other Supreme Beings began to discuss.

"Damn the Ten Thousand Races, you dare to threaten us!"

One of the Supremes said angrily.

"Forget it, although it will affect us a little, it will not affect the plan, the real accumulation of luck is after the collision of the two universes, hmph, once the two universes come into contact, war will inevitably break out. When the time comes, the Chaos Arcana of the two universes will merge together and completely suppress the origin of the two universes. At that time, it doesn't matter how many Supremes you kill. Whether these Supremes can survive the attacks of other Universe Supremes is still a question. They think that if we don't deal with them, they will be able to survive and be able to transcend? It's ridiculous! Strength is the most important thing!"

The main road of the Yuangu.

"That's right, what the Lord of the Yuan Gu said is very true, let's wait!"

All the supreme ways.

......

When those Supremes of the Twelve Universe Era discussed with the Supremes of the Ten Thousand Races, Ye Tian didn't know at first, but this matter soon came out, and he naturally knew about it, and knew that the two sides had signed an agreement.

Wasteland.

The second deity muttered: "The Supremes of the Ten Thousand Races have signed an agreement with the Supremes of the Twelve Universe Eras, which has bought me a lot of time, otherwise if the war breaks out, the human race will also be involved, and there is not much time left for me to grow, now this is good, at least let me have enough time to grow!"

Immediately, he was ready to let the first deity enter the Wasteland.

Under Ye Tian's arrangement, ten days later, his first deity appeared outside the desolate realm, and the second deity personally accessed the desolate realm.

And the Deserted Pagoda has also become Ye Tian's cultivation place!

Here, he will start a period of cultivation and completely improve his strength.

At that time, his combat effectiveness will reach a very terrifying level.
